mapper.sql: t.id, t.order_id, t.order_no, t.order_type, t.order_source, t.source_remark, t.customer_type, t.order_state, t.end_type, t.previous_order_state, t.brand_code, t.sale_model, t.build_config_code, t.region_code, t.store_code, t.sales_code, t.vehicle_vin, t.has_exception, t.current_version_no, t.locked_flag, t.reopen_flag, t.cancel_reason, t.close_reason, t.void_reason, t.created_at_business, t.audit_submit_time, t.audit_pass_time, t.lock_time, t.delivery_finish_time, t.finish_time, t.cancel_time, t.close_time, t.create_time, t.create_by, t.modify_time, t.modify_by, t.row_version, t.row_valid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vso_order ( id, order_id, order_no, order_type, order_source, source_remark, customer_type, order_state, end_type, previous_order_state, brand_code, sale_model, build_config_code, region_code, store_code, sales_code, vehicle_vin, has_exception, current_version_no, locked_flag, reopen_flag, cancel_reason, close_reason, void_reason, created_at_business, audit_submit_time, audit_pass_time, lock_time, delivery_finish_time, finish_time, cancel_time, close_time, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{orderId}, #{orderNo}, #{orderType}, #{orderSource}, #{sourceRemark}, #{customerType}, #{orderState}, #{endType}, #{previousOrderState}, #{brandCode}, #{saleModel}, #{buildConfigCode}, #{regionCode}, #{storeCode}, #{salesCode}, #{vehicleVin}, #{hasException}, #{currentVersionNo}, #{lockedFlag}, #{reopenFlag}, #{cancelReason}, #{closeReason}, #{voidReason}, #{createdAtBusiness}, #{auditSubmitTime}, #{auditPassTime}, #{lockTime}, #{deliveryFinishTime}, #{finishTime}, #{cancelTime}, #{closeTime}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE vso_order t SET
t.order_no = #{orderNo},
t.order_type = #{orderType},
t.order_source = #{orderSource},
t.source_remark = #{sourceRemark},
t.customer_type = #{customerType},
t.order_state = #{orderState},
t.end_type = #{endType},
t.previous_order_state = #{previousOrderState},
t.brand_code = #{brandCode},
t.sale_model = #{saleModel},
t.build_config_code = #{buildConfigCode},
t.region_code = #{regionCode},
t.store_code = #{storeCode},
t.sales_code = #{salesCode},
t.vehicle_vin = #{vehicleVin},
t.has_exception = #{hasException},
t.current_version_no = #{currentVersionNo},
t.locked_flag = #{lockedFlag},
t.reopen_flag = #{reopenFlag},
t.cancel_reason = #{cancelReason},
t.close_reason = #{closeReason},
t.void_reason = #{voidReason},
t.created_at_business = #{createdAtBusiness},
t.audit_submit_time = #{auditSubmitTime},
t.audit_pass_time = #{auditPassTime},
t.lock_time = #{lockTime},
t.delivery_finish_time = #{deliveryFinishTime},
t.finish_time = #{finishTime},
t.cancel_time = #{cancelTime},
t.close_time = #{closeTime},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE vso_order t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
UPDATE vso_order t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.order_no = #{orderNo}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM vso_order t WHERE t.id = #{value}
DELETE FROM vso_order t WHERE t.order_no = #{orderNo}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM vso_order t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vso_order t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
SELECT FROM vso_order t WHERE t.order_no = #{orderNo} AND t.row_valid = 1
SELECT FROM vso_order t WHERE t.order_no = #{orderNo} AND t.row_valid = 1
SELECT FROM vso_order t WHERE t.order_id = #{orderId} AND t.row_valid = 1
